item.title: A message from Mr. Spence:
item.description: We have an Admissions representative from Algonquin College visiting the school today during lunch to set up a table for students to come by and ask questions in the atrium regarding admissions, offers, and anything else concerning applications.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: A reminder that Friday, April 10th is a pre-paid dress Down Day

item.title: A message from Mrs. Marcellus in the Guidance Office:
item.description: Grade 12 students who still have community service hours to hand in, please do so as soon as possible. A minimum of 40 community service hours are required in order to graduate. The deadline for submission is May 19th and your 40 hours must be submitted in order to attend PROM.

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan.
item.description: A reminder for Garden Club members: We will be transplanting seedlings after school in room 201 today! See you there!

item.title: A message from Student Council:
item.description: Popcorn days are back! $2 tomorrow for popcorn during lunch in the atrium!
